description_long: This bollard is a robust, cylindrical post made of dark, weathered metal, capped with a prominent spherical top. The lower portion of the post shows signs of wear and corrosion, suggesting long-term outdoor exposure. Along two opposite sides, heavy-duty metal chains are attached via evenly spaced holes, likely for access control or demarcation purposes. The chains are thick and industrial, suitable for preventing vehicle or pedestrian passage. The surface of the bollard is hard and slightly rough, with a matte to semi-gloss finish that reflects minimal light. The overall design is utilitarian, intended for urban environments such as sidewalks, parking lots, or park entrances.
description: A sturdy, dark metal bollard with a spherical cap and attached heavy chains on two sides, showing weathered wear at the base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical post with a spherical cap and two rows of heavy metal chains attached along the sides.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the row of chain attachment holes and the absence of chains on this face, highlighting the worn lower section.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the chains on both sides and the weathered base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible chain attachment holes and a clear view of the corroded lower section.
